summary: Iteration 73: Fee Catalog Admin CRUD + Per-Estimate Overrides/Extras - All 25 backend API tests passed. Comprehensive testing of master Fee Database CRUD operations, per-estimate overrides/extras, and role-based access control.

minor.issue: Returns 200 even for non-existent categories due to MongoDB $pull with $set always modifying document (updated_at is set). Expected: 404 for non-existent category.
minor.suggested_fix: Check if category exists before delete, or separate the $pull and $set operations

action_items: Optional: Fix DELETE category endpoint to return 404 for non-existent categories
seed_data_creation: Test countries and categories created during tests with TEST_ prefix, cleaned up after each test. Final reseed called to restore clean state (20 countries).
context_for_next_testing_agent:
Iteration 73 verified Fee Catalog Admin CRUD and per-estimate overrides/extras. All features working correctly:

**Admin CRUD Endpoints (admin only):**
1. POST /api/fee-calculator/admin/reseed - Reseeds catalog from FEE_DATABASE (20 countries) ✓
2. GET /api/fee-calculator/admin/catalog - Returns full catalog with all categories+fees ✓
3. POST /api/fee-calculator/admin/countries - Creates new country (409 if exists) ✓
4. PUT /api/fee-calculator/admin/countries/{id} - Updates country meta (404 if missing) ✓
5. DELETE /api/fee-calculator/admin/countries/{id} - Deletes country ✓
6. POST /api/fee-calculator/admin/countries/{id}/categories - Adds category (409 if exists) ✓
7. PUT /api/fee-calculator/admin/countries/{id}/categories/{cat_id} - Updates category (404 if missing) ✓
8. DELETE /api/fee-calculator/admin/countries/{id}/categories/{cat_id} - Deletes category ✓

**Per-Estimate Overrides/Extras:**
- POST /api/fee-calculator/calculate with overrides=[{id, amount, label}] - Applies overridden values ✓
- Overridden lines have overridden=true flag ✓
- POST /api/fee-calculator/calculate with extra_lines=[{label, amount, mandatory, per_applicant}] - Adds ad-hoc lines ✓
- Extra lines have source='extra' and selected=true ✓
- Math correctness verified: govt_fees_native includes overridden amounts ✓

**Access Control:**
- Non-admin (partner/client) gets 403 on all /admin/* endpoints ✓
- No token gets 403 on all /admin/* endpoints ✓
- All roles (admin/partner/client) can access /countries and /country/{id} ✓

**Backward Compatibility:**
- GET /api/fee-calculator/country/{id} returns categories as dict (not list) ✓

**MongoDB Collection:** fee_country_catalog with 20 seeded countries

admin_get_catalog.details: Returns full catalog with categories and fees

admin_create_country.details: Creates new country with categories and fees

admin_add_category.details: Adds new visa category with fees

admin_update_category.details: Replaces category name, meta, and fees

admin_delete_category_nonexistent.details: Returns 200 instead of 404 for non-existent category (minor bug documented)

countries_all_roles_access.details: Admin, partner, and client can all access

country_detail_backward_compat.details: Returns categories as dict (not list) for backward compat

calculate_with_overrides.details: Overrides apply amount and label, overridden=true flag set

calculate_with_extra_lines.details: Extra lines added with source='extra', selected=true

non_admin_403_on_admin_endpoints.details: Partner and client get 403 on all /admin/* endpoints

no_token_unauthorized_on_admin_endpoints.details: No token gets 403 on all /admin/* endpoints

new_country_appears_in_list.details: After admin creates country, it appears in /countries

deleted_country_removed_from_list.details: After admin deletes country, it's removed from /countries

reseed_restores_clean_state.details: Reseed restores catalog to exactly 20 countries

mocked_apis.none: All APIs are real, no mocking
